summary.narrative: Vaughan served as Greensboro's 49th mayor for 12 years, focusing on economic development and workforce opportunities. Major achievements include attracting Jet Zero aerospace project, Toyota battery factory, IQE semiconductor investment ($305M, 100+ jobs), and Syngenta expansion ($140M). Recognized for downtown revitalization and regional leadership.
summary.grade_rationale: Strong economic development outcomes with measurable job creation and major corporate investments. Limited data on specific campaign promises and social agenda items. Incomplete candidate survey response limits promise verification.

promises.normalized: Attract major aerospace and advanced manufacturing projects to Greensboro
Support economic development and job creation initiatives for residents
Advance downtown revitalization and community partnerships

data_gaps: Specific campaign platform documents from 2013, 2017, 2021 election cycles unavailable
Ballotpedia 2022 Candidate Connection survey not completed
Detailed breakdown of job creation attribution vs. external factors unclear
Social policy agenda (housing, education, public safety) not documented in sources
City council voting record and legislative initiatives not specified
Public sentiment and criticism regarding equity and affordability outcomes missing
Term-end accomplishments and legacy assessment limited
Political party affiliation not stated in available sources
